---
name: Bug Report
about: Style analysis gave wrong results or writing output missed the mark
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
---

## Dimension(s) Affected
Which of the 24 dimensions is wrong? (e.g., D7 Vocabulary Tier, D13 Confidence)

## Expected Behavior
What should the analysis/writing have produced?

## Actual Behavior
What did it actually produce?

## Context
- Author analyzed:
- Number of samples:
- Agent used (Claude Code / Codex / Pi / other):
- Mode (analyze / write):

## Additional Context
Paste relevant excerpts from the style profile or generated text.
